data.body: PASS-2 (independent re-verification, findings 0–11). Code-grounded against attest.py:96–124 + build_manifest (33–41), and ticket graph (children 22bf/5a6c, sibling-bug a36b). Key results: [8] cited code accurate — head_sha mismatch already invalidates on any commit, so "silent staling" is the inverse of shipped behavior; epic BODY still frames it as under-invalidation though children/G6-comments name over-invalidation. [9] cited code accurate — build_manifest omits head_sha from the signed payload; content-addressed rationale lives only in the decomposition comment/22bf, not the epic body (largely duplicates a self-surfaced G6 finding). [10] citation MISREAD — a36b titles "ANY new commit invalidates" as a BUG TO FIX (over-invalidation), not a requirement the plan drops; the any-commit behavior is only the empty-set conservative FALLBACK in 22bf. [11] child 5a6c (narrowed delta-re-review) is a LIVE open story under this epic (parent 4fcd, depends_on 22bf), deliberately sequenced, not silently dropped. [0–3] genuine epic-body gaps but resolved in design-of-record children. [4] genuine epic-altitude residual (rollout of pre-signed attestations). [5/6/7] partial/weak.
